series_metadata.series_description: Checks and correspondence pertainin to checks from applicants for licensure/certification which are returned by the Treasurer''''s Office.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until acceptable payment is received, then destroy. If determined uncollectable by the Attorney General, retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. ; Electronic: Retain until acceptable payment is received, then destroy. If determined uncollectable by the Attorney General, retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
